comments.body:
Thanks @stefanrua 
I am no expert on the syntax but this seems to make sense
LGTM
I'm not familiar with the syntax either, I just imitated the working links. I hope that someone familiar with it can confirm.

LGTM
the Underscore turns the listed command into a link to the manpage.
